verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Come, Thou Fount of every blessing Tune my heart to sing Thy grace Streams of mercy, never ceasing Call for songs of loudest praise Teach me some melodious sonnet Sung by flaming tongues above Praise the mount! I'm fixed upon it Mount of thy redeeming love

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Here I raise mine Ebenezer Hither by Thy help I'm come And I know, by Thy good pleasure Safely I'll arrive at home Jesus sought me when a stranger Wandering from the fold of God He, to rescue me from danger Interposed His precious blood.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: O, to grace how great a debtor Daily I'm constrained to be Let Thy goodness, like a fetter Bind my wandering heart to Thee Prone to wander, Lord, I feel it Prove to leave the God I love Here's my heart, Lord, take and seal it Seal it for Thy courts above

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: O, that day when freed from sinning, I shall see Thy lovely face Clo-thed then in blood washed linen How I'll sing Thy sovereign grace Come, my Lord, no longer tarry Take my ransomed soul away Send thine angels now to carry Me to realms of endless day
